name: sp_bake_export
description: SP 烘焙与导出工作流：烘焙贴图、配置导出预设、批量导出。 Use when AI needs to: (1) bake texture maps, (2) export textures, (3) configure export settings. Substance Painter only (run_python).
author: ArtClaw

tools.name: sp_bake_export
